caption: A presentation slide is displayed, featuring the "exotel" logo at the top and the title "Handling Logs, Events and Metrics Using Heka" in large white text. Below the title, the name "Siddharth Ramesh" is listed along with the contact information "sid@exotel.in / @sidramesh." At the bottom, small text reads, "All rights reserved. Exotel Techcom Pvt. Ltd. © 2016." A blue vertical banner on the left side contains the "has geek" logo, "###", and "root.conf." A man wearing a dark blue polo shirt and a lanyard stands to the left of the screen, partially obscured by the blue banner. Throughout the frames, the man remains stationary, and the content of the presentation slide does not change, showing a static scene of a presenter standing next to his introductory slide.
